title: Report Center
subtitle: Select a query, configure parameters and view results
select_query_prompt: Select a query from the list on the left to start.

rapport_mensuel.description: Revenue, margins, receivables for a given month

historique_client.name: Customer History
historique_client.description: All products purchased by a client with dates and quantities

alertes_stock.description: Stock < Avg Rotation OR Stock <= Min Threshold

produits_perimes.description: Products expired or close to expiration date

historique_ventes.name: Sales by Time Range
historique_ventes.description: Products sold over a given period

produits_non_vendus.name: Unsold Products
produits_non_vendus.description: Products without any sale for X days

stock_negatif.name: Negative Stock
stock_negatif.description: Products with negative or low stock, sorted by quantity

valeur_stock_journalier.name: Daily Stock Value
valeur_stock_journalier.description: Historical reconstruction of stock value, purchases and sales

produits_tva.name: Products with VAT
produits_tva.description: List of products subject to VAT (> 0%)

stocks_morts.name: Dead Stock
stocks_morts.description: High value products (sleeping money) with no sales

alertes_annulations.name: Suspicious Cancellation Alerts
alertes_annulations.description: Users with a high cancellation rate (> threshold)

produits_vendus_tva.name: Sold Products (VAT)
produits_vendus_tva.description: Products with VAT > 0 sold during the period

meilleurs_clients.name: Best Customers
meilleurs_clients.description: Customer ranking by revenue and visit count

recap_paiements_fournisseurs.name: Supplier Payments Summary
recap_paiements_fournisseurs.description: Sum of payments by date and supplier

produits_annules.name: Cancelled Products
produits_annules.description: List of products from cancelled invoices with quantities and lots
